---
title: "Climatology"
subtitle: "The science of climate systems, atmospheric processes, and global weather patterns."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---



Welcome to the **Climatology** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course explores the Earth's atmosphere, climate systems, and the physical processes that drive weather and climate variability at local, regional, and global scales.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Composition and Structure of Atmosphere; Insolation, Heat Budget of Earth.**
* **Temperature, Pressure and Winds, Atmospheric Circulation (air-masses, fronts and upper air circulation, cyclones and anticyclones).**
* **Climatic Classification of Koppen & Thornthwaite.**
* **ENSO Events (El Nino, La Nina and Southern Oscillations).**
* **Meteorological Hazards and Disasters (Cyclones, Thunderstorms, Tornadoes, Hailstorms, Heat and Cold waves, Drought and Cloudburst, GLOF).**
* **Climate Change: Evidences and Causes of Climatic Change in the past, Human impact on Global Climate.**

---

{{< include climatology/01-composition-and-structure-of-the-atmosphere.md >}}

{{< include climatology/02-insolation-and-heat-budget-of-the-earth.md >}}

{{< include climatology/03-distribution-of-temperature.md >}}

{{< include climatology/04-atmospheric-pressure-and-general-circulation-of-winds.md >}}

{{< include climatology/05-monsoons-and-jet-streams.md >}}

{{< include climatology/06-stability-and-instability-of-the-atmosphere.md >}}

{{< include climatology/07-air-masses-and-fronts.md >}}

{{< include climatology/08-temperate-and-tropical-cyclones.md >}}

{{< include climatology/09-types-and-distribution-of-precipitation.md >}}

{{< include climatology/10-classification-of-world-climates.md >}}

{{< include climatology/11-hydrological-cycle.md >}}

{{< include climatology/12-global-warming.md >}}

{{< include climatology/13-air-masses-and-fronto.md >}}

{{< include climatology/14-applied-climatology.md >}}

{{< include climatology/15-atmosphere-structure-composition.md >}}

{{< include climatology/16-atmospheric-circulation.md >}}

{{< include climatology/17-atmospheric-stability-and-instability.md >}}

{{< include climatology/18-climate-change.md >}}

{{< include climatology/19-climate-classification.md >}}

{{< include climatology/20-course-content.md >}}

{{< include climatology/21-global-climatic-change-and-role-and-response-of-man-in-climatic-changes.md >}}

{{< include climatology/22-insolation-heat-budget.md >}}

{{< include climatology/23-koppens-thornthwaites-and-trewar-thas-classification-of-world-climate.md >}}

{{< include climatology/24-köppens-scheme.md >}}

{{< include climatology/25-moisture-precipitation.md >}}

{{< include climatology/26-planetary-and-local-winds.md >}}

{{< include climatology/27-temperature-and-pressure-belts-of-the-world.md >}}

{{< include climatology/28-thornthwaites-scheme.md >}}

{{< include climatology/29-weather-and-climate.md >}}
